case_title: CIN, CLIFF C. VS TOGNOTTI, WILLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY CIN, CLIFF C. AS TO DEFENDANT TOGNOTTI, WILLIAM RAVANI-TOGNOTTI, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CIN, CLIFF C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOGNOTTI, WILLIAM RAVANI-TOGNOTTI, INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
